headline.headline_text: Source-conditional Buy (moderate-positive bias) at $221.56, base case PT $260 on FY27E EPS $6.50 (S4: consensus n=15 median $6.52) × 40x (S4: 5y trailing average P/E vs current 46x, mid-cycle multiple). 12-month median expected return +15.3%; scenario-weighted range [-28%, +52%], CONDITIONAL on (i) Blackwell ASP and margin discipline confirmed through FY27Q1 print on 2026-05-20 (S3: NVDA Q4 FY26 call 2026-02-25 guided 75% non-GAAP GM ±50bp) AND (ii) hyperscaler aggregate CY2026 capex YoY >+50% maintained across MSFT/GOOG/META/AMZN — currently +77% (S3: hyperscaler Q1 CY26 earnings calls). If hyperscaler capex falsifies <+30% OR FY27Q1 GM <73% OR AMD MI400 hyperscaler share >15% confirmed, downgrade to Hold; if FY27Q1 print confirms guide with positive Blackwell mix commentary, upgrade headline to unconditional Buy.
